One deal over $100,000 was her goal for
the year and she closed three in 90 days
that are well over six figures. Here's
what actually changed. She built the
business case live with her champion on
the call. Her champion said it looked
like she had done it for years and it
was her first one. She ran a deeper
discovery being able to quantify actual
business pain and impact and mapped
every stakeholder. She stopped hoping
deals would close and started running
them. Now do the math on your own team.
One rep found three six-figure deals she
was already missing. Let's say you have
eight reps, [music] maybe 12 or more.
How many deals are stuck in your
pipeline right now for no reason? Now
that is a gap we find in the executive
snapshot. It's a free 45-minute working
session. You walk with a map of where
your team is leaking revenue plus the
top three fixes. And we're so confident
that you'll find this valuable that if
you don't find [music] it valuable for
any reason, we'll send you $500. Link is
below. And of course, we'll see you in
the next video.
